name: tr808-listing
markdown:
Vintage Roland TR-808 Drum Machine — Restored Unit

Posted on the 3rd of March, 2026 by the shop.

This fully serviced TR-808 is a legend of a machine. We replaced the
electrolytic caps and calibrated every voice. Asking nine hundred and
fifty dollars or near offer. Ships worldwide from Berlin.

Condition: excellent, light cosmetic wear on the casing.
Tags: analog, drum-machine, vintage, roland

(No warranty information or seller rating is listed on this page.)
